Checklist Item (Yes/No): Team is ready to begin on time when called
Evidence To Observe: Demo starts without delay beyond allocated transition/setup

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Demo environment is operational at start
Evidence To Observe: Deployed app or stable runtime loads successfully

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Seed data includes a primary demo user with multiple documents
Evidence To Observe: At least 6-8 documents are available for the demo

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Second user account exists for ownership checks
Evidence To Observe: Team can switch users for security evidence

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Document library list view is available
Evidence To Observe: Global document list is visible and usable

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Document metadata displays correctly
Evidence To Observe: Title, type, status, tags, and updated date are visible

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Document upload validation works
Evidence To Observe: Supported format uploads succeed and unsupported are rejected

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Version history is visible and usable
Evidence To Observe: Team can open version metadata/history for a document

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Duplicate and rename workflow works
Evidence To Observe: A document can be duplicated and renamed cleanly

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Archive and restore workflow works
Evidence To Observe: Document can be archived and restored without losing history

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Job detail shows linked documents clearly
Evidence To Observe: Linked document section is visible and understandable

Checklist Item (Yes/No): One resume and one cover letter max are enforced per job (negative/constraint case)
Evidence To Observe: Replacement or duplicate link is blocked/confirmed as required

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Company research can be triggered from job detail
Evidence To Observe: User-provided prompt/context drives research generation

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Company research output saves as editable job notes
Evidence To Observe: Research output persists to the job record

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Interview prep notes section is usable
Evidence To Observe: Structured notes can be edited and saved

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Analytics show velocity and stage conversion
Evidence To Observe: Dashboard metrics reflect persisted events

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Analytics are based on stored backend data not UI-only state
Evidence To Observe: Team can explain source of metric values

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Deployment checks and health checks are visible in CI/CD evidence
Evidence To Observe: Pipeline includes deployment and health verification

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Centralized error handling/logging evidence is shown
Evidence To Observe: Sanitized error output or logged failure path is visible

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Smoke-test or release-readiness evidence is present
Evidence To Observe: Demo-critical flow has verification evidence

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Team opens GitHub Actions and shows latest relevant workflow run
Evidence To Observe: Actions page is shown live with recent run context

Checklist Item (Yes/No): GitHub Actions evidence shows build + unit test execution
Evidence To Observe: Workflow details clearly include build/test jobs

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Team can show negative unit tests for document/workflow rules
Evidence To Observe: At least one negative test is demonstrated live

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Team can show negative unit tests for deployment/reliability checks
Evidence To Observe: At least one negative test tied to CI/CD or error handling is demonstrated

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Team is prepared to show at least three negative unit tests and explain each
Evidence To Observe: Three negative tests are shown and briefly explained
